arts.ttl: Arne Slot offers short response over fresh Trent Alexander-Arnold exit rumours
arts.sum: Real Madrid are reportedly ready to move to the next phase of their plan to sign Trent Alexander-Arnold in 2025. Alexander-Arnold is out of contract at Liverpool at the end of the 2024/25 season with talks on an extension ongoing. arts.ttl: Chelsea pose big threat to Liverpool having joined race for £100m talent
arts.sum: Last summer, Chelsea beat Liverpool to the signing of Moises Caicedo and history may repeat itself in 2025 as both Premier League giants have shown interest in another Brighton talent. The Reds agreed a £111m deal with Brighton to sign the midfielder during the summer of 2023, but having given priority to the London club, […] The post Chelsea pose big threat to Liverpool having joined race for £100m talent appeared first on CaughtOffside.

arts.ttl: Mohamed Salah matches Liverpool legend with Premier League Player of the Month award as Arne Slot joins exclusive club
